content.en:
No Road Tower, No. 3 Branch Tower.

Ye Tianlai came to meet the Lord of Canggu, and soon met the Lord of Canggu.

"I've seen the Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, what are you looking for me?" asked the Lord of the Ancients.

Ye Tian immediately asked: "Lord of the Ancients, I have already fused the rudiments of my own Extreme Dao to thirty-three types, but continuing to fuse has fallen into shackles, and Extreme Dao Mountain does not contain my own Extreme Dao, even if I comprehend more Extreme Dao in Extreme Dao Mountain, it will not help me break the shackles." I don't know why I haven't been able to break through, so I'm here to ask the Lord of the Ancients. "

"What, you've fused your Extreme Dao Prototype Enlightenment to thirty-three levels?"

The Lord of the Ancients was shocked.

He knew very well how difficult it was to comprehend his own extreme path, and he also comprehended the extreme path of time and space at the beginning, so he wanted to comprehend his own extreme path, but it was difficult to advance an inch!

Eventually, he gave up on his own extreme path and instead stepped into the realm of the perfect controller with the extreme path of time and space.

And now, such a short time has passed, and Ye Tian has fused his Extreme Dao Prototype Comprehension to thirty-three kinds, how can this not shock him!

If an ordinary person said that he had fused his Extreme Dao Prototype Enlightenment to thirty-three changes, he would definitely not believe it, but when these words came out of Ye Tian's mouth, he naturally believed it.

"Ye Tian, for the matter of his own extreme path, the average Three Realms Perfect Controller really doesn't know very well, but I do know some. The Lord of the Ancient said: "According to my understanding, any half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm will have bottlenecks in comprehending their own Extreme Paths, and some of them will be completely unable to progress when there are hundreds of changes, even if they comprehend more Extreme Paths, or comprehend those Extreme Paths to an incomparably high realm, they will not be able to help break the shackles. And you only encountered the shackles when you were thirty-three changes, and your luck was already very good!"

"According to your situation, if you want to break the shackles and continue to fuse the changes in your own extreme path rudiment, ordinary treasures or methods will not work, there is only one way, and that is to use some special extreme path treasures to break the boundaries of your will and let your will become the will of the extreme path. "

The Lord of the Ancients.

"Extreme will?"

Ye Tian heard of the Extreme Dao Will for the first time.

The Lord of the Ancient Ages smiled and introduced: "The body of control has the body of the Extreme Dao, and the will naturally also has the will of the Extreme Dao. However, it is difficult for the will to transform into the will of the Extreme Dao, and the will of those who are super-perfect masters is not the will of the Extreme Dao, but once the super-perfect master breaks through to the Perfection of the Void Realm, the will will will automatically transform into the will of the Extreme Dao. However, you are a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm, and if you want to transform your will into the Extreme Will, you can only find those special Extreme Path treasures, and you must be of great help to the will. I have a treasure like this in my hand, but it is definitely not enough, and I can only give birth to a little bit of the breath of the will of the Extreme Dao in your will. But I can't give it to you in vain. "

"Lord of the Ancients, how can I obtain the Extreme Dao Treasure in your hand, and what conditions do I need?"

Ye Tian asked.

"As long as you guide my junior Yueli, let her master the Extreme Dao of Water in the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm!"

The Lord of the Ancient made a request.

"What, to help the master of the moon glass comprehend the Extreme Dao of Water?"

Ye Tian was stunned, it turned out to be such a request.

"Lord of the Ancients, if you personally guide, it's easier, why do you let me guide?" Ye Tian wondered.

The Lord of the Ancient Ages shook his head and said: "I haven't comprehended the Extreme Dao of Water, and the talent of the girl of Yueli, I also know very well that if she is allowed to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, there is almost no possibility of comprehending it, so her greatest hope is to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Water that is incomparably compatible with her." However, I can't help her much in the Water's Extreme. Although I know some old friends who have learned the way of water, it is almost impossible to ask them to guide the moon girl all the time, so only you can help her. Plus, you're progressing so fast, maybe you're better suited to coach Tsukiri. "

"This ......"

Ye Tian hesitated, not knowing whether to agree or not.

But an extreme treasure that helps to improve his will, he doesn't want to give up!

The Lord of the Ancient also said that the reason why he fell into the shackles was not because he was not talented enough, nor because the number of extreme paths he had attained was not enough, but because his will could not bear the power of his own extreme path, and he had to let his own extreme path transform into an extreme will, so that he could comprehend and condense his own endless extreme path.

Therefore, he must collect enough Extreme Treasure to transform his will.

And right now, the Extreme Dao Treasure in the hands of the Lord of the Ancient was the only Extreme Dao Treasure that he could hope to obtain.

"Think about it!"

The Lord of the Ancients.

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Very good!" The Lord of Canggu was very satisfied, and immediately took out his own Extreme Dao Treasure, "This is the Extreme Dao Treasure Blue Zero Liquid, it is an Extreme Dao Treasure that can greatly improve your will, if you have enough Blue Zero Liquid, you can also raise your will to the Extreme Dao Will, but I only have more than a hundred drops in my hand." "

"Lord of the Ancients, I haven't instructed the Moon Glass Controller yet, so will I give me the Extreme Dao Treasure?" Ye Tian said in surprise.

"Naturally, I'm going to give it to you now, after all, I also know Yueli's talent, who knows when she will be able to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Water, you can't delay your cultivation because of her." Moreover, you took the reward, am I still worried that you won't guide Yueli?" said the Lord of the Ancient with a smile.

"Lord of Canggu, rest assured, I will definitely work hard to guide the Moon Glass Master!"

Ye Tian assured.

Immediately, Ye Tian left with these green zero liquids.

Soon after, the Lord of the Ancients summoned the Moonglass Controller to him.

"Ancestor!"

Yueli shouted happily.

For outsiders, she is very cold, but for her ancestors, she is naturally very enthusiastic, after all, the ancestors love her very much!

"Girl Yueli, how is your Water Extreme Dao comprehension?" asked the Lord of the Ancients.

As soon as she heard this, Yueli's face collapsed, "Old Ancestor, I haven't made much progress, I'm still in more than eight hundred changes, and my time in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm has run out, and now my progress is very slow." "

"I've found you a temporary teacher to guide you in your cultivation of the Water Extreme!"

The Lord of the Ancient said.

"Teacher, teach me the Extreme Way of Water?" Yueli was surprised, and then said in surprise: "Great, is it a strong person like your ancestor?"
